feed.title: SAP Community - Support Services
feed.subtitle: Support Services blog posts in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Enterprise Support Academy Newsletter December 2023
entry.content:
Dear customers,

Find here an overview of the SAP Enterprise Support Academy monthly newsletter on latest news, training course, upcoming sessions, and further educational offerings.

The SAP Enterprise Support Academy provides expert guidance and high impact knowledge transfer services that enable you to innovate and be successful with your SAP solutions.

Subscribe to regularly receive latest news and stay informed about the wide range of educational offerings provided by the SAP Enterprise Support Academy that help you to build the digital skills tailored to your needs.

Preview available live sessions on SAP Support Portal, tailored per region:
APJ | EMEA | Latin America | North America*

Please note: A one-time registration for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support [accessible here] is necessary to register for these events.

 

Better Data Volume Management With SAP Enterprise Support

Experience the data volume management value map with enhanced features and content to facilitate improved data volumes in your unique SAP environment. Join today to benefit from learnings, collaborative forums, and access to SAP experts, all included as part of your SAP Cloud subscription.

Read more

 

SAP Analytics Cloud Fundamentals

We’ve updated our Expert-guided Implementation session: SAP Analytics Cloud Fundamentals with new dates available in December and January. It’s a multiday remote course providing an overview on the model and story development in SAP Analytics Cloud. During the workshop, you can practice all exercises demonstrated within your own system.

Register to a session that suits you: SAP Analytics Cloud Fundamentals

 

New Learning Journey „SAP Cloud ALM for Service"

With SAP Cloud ALM for Service SAP provides a new concept for customers to centrally access all information for support services of the past, the present and the future. It allows to collaborate more closely with the delivery teams and to follow up on the results.

Get started with our new Learning Journey

 

BTP Onboarding Webinar Focused on Application Development

Learn how SAP BTP is your goto for uncovered requirements. This session covers onboarding fundamentals before shifting gears to an SAP S/4HANA implementation where an application development use case unexpectedly pops up. We navigate you end-to-end through the process of obtaining the requirements from your leadership all the way to a viable finished product.

Join us on December 7

 

Updated Flagship Learning Program “SAP Integration Suite: Become an Integration Black-belt”

Integration Black Belt is an enabler program from SAP to become a subject matter expert in SAP’s Integration Technology and Strategy. Learn about the various capabilities of SAP’s integration platform and learn best practices to effectively support your integration journey. Earn a digital badge as a confirmation of successful completion.

Access the program: Become an Integration Black-belt

View available blog: Take the opportunity to become an Integration Black-Belt

 

SAP Enterprise Support Day 2023: Watch the Replays!

SAP Enterprise Support Day 2023 took place on November 8 & 9, 2023. A virtual event providing insights on how to speed up business transformation and impact the path toward business excellence with the latest services and tools from the foundational support portfolio. Access all materials and watch the replays.

SAP Enterprise Support Day 2023: Watch the replays!

 

New Learning Program “Learn to Develop Using low-code Through SAP Build”

Join our new Learning Program and get an introduction of the various components of SAP Build. At the end of the course, you’re invited to put your knowledge into action. Create a sales order process in SAP Build Process Automation, trigger the process, and put it all together in an own digital workspace using SAP Build Work Zone.

Access the program: Learn to develop using low-code through SAP Build

Access the SAP BTP Value Map blog (value maps access required)

 

In-Depth With SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition

Join the product series “In-Depth with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition”. The series aims to provide SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition product deep-dive knowledge, independently from the quarterly release update.

Click here for further details and the full list of recordings: In-Depth With SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition

 

SAP Cloud ALM Extended to Cover SAP BTP

SAP Cloud ALM, a cloud-based tool for application lifecycle management, already offers capabilities for the implementation, operation, and service of many SAP applications, including SAP S/4HANA and SAP SuccessFactors software. Now SAP Cloud ALM will extend its capabilities to centrally operate Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) applications and custom extensions built and run on SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP), including SAP BTP Cloud Foundry environment.

Read more in the interview

 

Pushing the Boundaries of Procurement Customer Support with Innovations

Customers increasingly adopt cloud solutions to enhance business value and innovation while reducing costs and risks. SAP offers Real-Time Support to assist procurement customers in achieving these goals. Rohan Patel, SAP's Global VP of Customer Support and Innovation for Product Support - Procurement, discusses the benefits of SAP's support in this context.

Check out the interview

 

SAP Enriches the Customer Experience With AI-Powered Support

Learn how Stefan Steinle, EVP, Head of Customer Support & Innovation, SAP SE talks about how SAP is enriching customer support through predictive intelligence by harnessing its AI-powered landscape. In addition to this, SAP’s Transformation Suite approach for customers provides a tool chain for business transformation. For those of you looking to tackle hybrid landscapes, Real-Time Support, and Built-In Support – SAP has this covered too.

Read the full article

 

Seamlessly Optimize Every Step of Your Data Transformation Journey

Listen to Stefanie Kübler, Vice President, Head of Business and Data Transformation Solutions, introducing the SAP Business Transformation Center, fueled by SAP Cloud ALM, a cutting-edge cloud-based solution revolutionizing data operations for organizations. Harnessing the full potential of the SAP Business Technology Platform, our guided approach to digital transformation effortlessly leads you towards becoming an intelligent enterprise. Seamlessly optimize every step of your data transformation journey and embrace agility and innovation with SAP Business Transformation Center.

Check out the video on YouTube




  • Guidance on signing up

  • SAP Enterprise Support Academy Video

  • SAP Enterprise Support Academy at a glance

  • Direct access to SAP Learning Hub (Login with your s-user ID and password)

  • SAP ES Academy Entitlement document

  • FAQ

  • SAP Enterprise Support value maps

  • SAP Support Portal

  • Basics: Sign up | Time zone setup |

  • Formats: EGI | MTE | AIE | Program

  • Search: Language | Keyword | Filter | Calendar

  • Upcoming live sessions in your region: APJ | EMEA | Latin America | North America

entry.title: Enriched version of Transportation Management Incident Creation with Support Assistant
entry.content:
When facing an issue with your SAP Transportation Management (TM) solution, have you ever tried to make use of the Support Assistant popup when creating an incident? Unfortunately, it might not have helped you to find a solution.

To change this we have reviewed the content of Support Assistant for TM and enriched it with many new knowledge and a more user friendly structure.

Support Assistant for TM is now offering more answers and guided help in many areas, especially for issues.

With this Next-Generation Support approach from SAP you can profit on improved customer support, anytime, anywhere, leveraging the latest technology and tools to speed up time to answers and provide a delightful experience.

Customers benefit with this new guided incident creation method in multiple ways:

    • Easily assign the correct solution area, leading to the correct assignment of SAP experts to assist. The incident reaches the right expert much faster.

 

    • Learn about possible trouble shooting steps & tools to analyze for example handling of corrections for inconsistencies on your own.

 

    • Solve a situation even before creating the incident with the support of targeted, relevant knowledge documents.

 

    • Capture all relevant information in very structured way for SAP to process your issue faster.



Give this great tool a try when creating your next support incident. You may already find an answer for your issue before sending it to SAP.

 


 

To access the Support Assistant, simply visit the SAP ONE Support Launchpad and start the incident creation process. Select the product for which you want to report an incident and the support assistant window pops up on the right hand side of the screen.

For more general information about Support Assistant, see "Improved Incident Creation: Try SAP's New Support Assistant"

entry.title: SAP Enterprise Support Academy Newsletter January 2024
entry.content:
Dear customers,

HAPPY NEW YEAR on behalf of the SAP Enterprise Support Academy team.

Find here an overview of the SAP Enterprise Support Academy monthly newsletter on latest news, training course, upcoming sessions, and further educational offerings.

The SAP Enterprise Support Academy provides expert guidance and high impact knowledge transfer services that enable you to innovate and be successful with your SAP solutions.

Subscribe to regularly receive latest news and stay informed about the wide range of educational offerings provided by the SAP Enterprise Support Academy that help you to build the digital skills tailored to your needs.

Preview available live sessions on SAP Support Portal, tailored per region:
APJ | EMEA | Latin America | North America*

Please note: A one-time registration for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support [accessible here] is necessary to register for these events.

 

SAP Cloud Identity Services: Open Office Hours

Get answers to all your questions around the migration to SAP Cloud Identity Services (Identity Authentication services and Identity Provisioning services). Just join our open office hours for customers and partners that take place every two weeks, on Thursdays.

Registration is required: Open Office Hours

 

Conversion to SAP S/4HANA Finance – Deep Dive

Join us in a multiday training session to discover everything you need to know about the phases and activities involved in your conversion of accounting to SAP S/4HANA. We have new sessions scheduled for early February and March.

Details and registration in this blog post

 

Group Reporting with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition

Group reporting is the SAP tool to help organizations to conduct financial consolidation. This e-learning will cover the key pillars of group reporting with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition. Explore the benefits of group reporting and you will learn the key steps on how to implement the solution such as data integration and data transformation.

Enroll the E-Learning today

 

Business Transformation With a Clean Core

Join our new 1-hour E-learning to get an introduction to clean core and why it is needed to resolve today’s ERP challenges. Understand the five clean core dimensions and SAP’s recommended objectives for each of those dimensions. Learn about the clean core journey and how to leverage clean core depending on your own business transformation.

Further details (value maps access required)

 

SAP Application Lifecycle Management EGI Schedule: January 2024

Watch out our SAP ALM schedule for with a wide list of Expert-guided Implementation (EGI) session upcoming in January 2024.

We’ll have six sessions on tree topics around SAP ALM and SAP Cloud ALM. So don’t miss getting yourself ready on all you need to learn around SAP Application Lifecycle Management.

Register SAP ALM EGI schedule January (value maps access required)

 

Learning Insights

Through our wide range of learning offerings, we help YOU build the skills you need to be successful with your SAP solutions. Did you know, throughout 2023, we conducted over 1100 live sessions and over 47,000 learning activities.

Find out the most popular live sessions and see what’s new in 2024:
Most Popular Learning Offerings
New Learning Items

 

Built-In Support Coverage Extended for SAP SuccessFactors

Built-In support provides SAP customers with an industry-leading, harmonized in-product experience across the entire cloud portfolio. Combined with a focus on enhanced self-service offerings powered by Artificial Intelligence, and direct access to SAP support content, tools, and channels at your fingertips - with no implementation effort required. Built-In support is now available in SAP SuccessFactors.

Check out the article

 

Register Now for the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 Early Release Series

We’re hosting a series of 19 live sessions to highlight the innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 release. Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. Don’t miss this chance and register now.

Register here: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 Early Release Series

 

Support Accreditation – A Support Learning Course for Customers and Partners in One Place

The customer-focused ‘Product Support Accreditation’ course has been combined with the partner-facing ‘Support and Success Essentials for SAP Cloud Solutions’ lesson – into one impactful learning called: Support Accreditation. This training enables all customers and partners, as well as all SAP users to make the best use of SAP’s support offerings and tools–at no additional costs.

For more insights, check out the SAP News Center interview

 

Leverage the Benefits of Guidance Through the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Value Maps

In SAP Enterprise Support we help you unleash the ‘power of finance transformation’. For this purpose, we’ve created content collections that support you exploring our SAP Solutions for Financial, Quote-to-Cash, and Billing and Revenue Innovation management (BRIM). With these collections, empower your knowledge with e-learnings, Meet-the-Expert sessions, release series and even SAP Enterprise Support remote services to safeguard your projects.

Join value maps to benefit from guided learning (value maps access required)

• Value map for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition
• Value map for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition

 

Check Out the Value Map For Spend Management and Business Network

Experience the advantages of structured learning and expert guidance by joining our SAP Enterprise Support value map for Spend Management and Business Network today. In addition to SAP Ariba, we now deliver SAP Concur and SAP Fieldglass content as well as enriched enablement materials, including new learning journeys, further resources, and value accelerators spanning solutions.

Read further in this blog post




  • Guidance on signing up

  • SAP Enterprise Support Academy Video

  • SAP Enterprise Support Academy at a glance

  • Direct access to SAP Learning Hub (Login with your s-user ID and password)

  • SAP ES Academy Entitlement document

  • FAQ

  • SAP Enterprise Support value maps

  • SAP Support Portal

  • Basics: Sign up | Time zone setup |

  • Formats: EGI | MTE | AIE | Program

  • Search: Language | Keyword | Filter | Calendar

  • Upcoming live sessions in your region: APJ | EMEA | Latin America | North America

entry.title: Auf Erfolgskurs mit SAP Preferred Success: Einblicke in den Alltag eines Customer Success Partners
entry.content:
Bevor wir beginnen: Unser Hauptprotagonist Torsten

Torsten ist ein 35-jähriger engagierter SAP Customer Success Partner (CSP) für einen großen Automobilzulieferer. Er ist ein engagierter und technisch versierter Profi, der als Vermittler zwischen SAP und dem Kunden fungiert. Sein Hauptziel ist es, die reibungslose Einführung der Cloudlösungen des Kunden sowie deren optimalen Betrieb zu gewährleisten. Dabei nutzt er eine Vielzahl von SAP-Tools und -Services und stimmt sich regelmässig mit dem Kunden ab. Seine Tätigkeiten laufen unter dem SAP Cloud-Service SAP Preferred Success. 

Abbildung: Illustration verschiedener Tätigkeiten im Rahmen von SAP Preferred Success

Vorbereitungen mit Onboarding und Cloud Mindset Workshop

Der Tag beginnt mit den Aktivitäten rund um das Onboarding des Kunden. Torsten stellt dabei sicher, dass der Kunde Zugang zu allen relevanten Ressourcen hat. Der Kunde bekommt alles an die Hand um selbstständig erfolgreich sein zu können. Zusätzlich weiß der Kunde nach dem Onboarding, wie er sich mit Torsten in Verbindung setzen kann und wie man gemeinsam offene Themen angeht.

Im Rahmen des Onboarding wird auch schon der Grundstein für die Zusammenarbeit zwischen Customer Success Partner und dem Kunden gelegt. Die ersten Regeltermine werden festgelegt und Kontaktdaten auf beiden Seiten ausgetauscht.

Der Cloud Mindset Workshop ist der Einstieg in die Welt der Services aus SAP Preferred Success. Hier wird gemeinsam der kulturelle und strukturelle Wandel reflektiert, der die Grundlage für die erfolgreiche Implementierung und Betrieb der SAP Cloud-Lösungen bildet.

Empfehlungen von Lerninhalten zum Aufbau von SAP Kenntnissen

Mit SAP Preferred Success erhält der Kunde fünf Lizenzen des SAP Learning Hubs, der umfassenden Lernplattform für SAP Produkte und Technologien. Torsten stellt sicher, daß der Kunde diese Lizenzen optimal nutzt. Dabei empfiehlt er passende Lerninhalte, Lernpfade und/ oder Zertifizierungen.

Unterstützung der Implementierung von SAP Cloudlösungen

In der Implementierungsphase einer SAP Cloud-Lösung bietet Torsten eine Reihe von Services an, darunter Solution Launch Checks bezüglich Integration, Extensibility, Identity & Access Management, Embedded Analytics, UX Exploration oder SAP Cloud ALM. Er kann diese aus einem Service Katalog auswählen je nach Bedarf seines Kunden.

Torsten will damit in Zusammenarbeit mit dem Kunden einen reibungslose Ablauf der Implementierung als auch einen optimalen Go-Live erzielen.

Der regelmässige Kreislauf aus Adoption, Operation & Optimierung

Im Einsatz befindliche Funktionen müssen zuverlässig sein. Gleichzeitig müssen sich bestehende und neue Funktionalitäten den wechselnden Bedürfnissen einer Organisation anpassen. Dazu werden über die regelmäßigen Releases ständig neue Möglichkeiten ausgerollt. 

Je nach Bedarf des Kunden stellt Torsten auch weitere Tools und Ressourcen vor, wie beispielsweise das RASD (Release Adoption and Scope Dependency Tool). Oder er greift auf weitere Services zurück wie zum Beispiel zur Guidance bei Regression Tests oder dem Unterstützen beim einem Post-Upgrade Test.

Individuelle SAP Preferred Success Services angepasst auf jede Phase und Situation

Torsten stellt je nach Phase und Anforderung des Kunden spezielle Services und Checks bereit. Dazu gehören beispielsweise Q-Gate Review Sessions, verschiedene Prüfungen und Checks wie z.B. Continuous Quality Checks (CQCs) oder Solution Launch Checks.

Zusätzlich kann es immer kundenindividuelle Ad Hoc Advisory Sessions geben. Je nach Cloudlösung können diese Services auch variieren.

Allumfassende Betreuung durch SAP Preferred Success

Torsten spielt eine Rolle gut vergleichbar mit einem Concierge Service oder einem personal Trainer. Seine Tätigkeiten erstrecken sich über den gesamten Produkt-Lebenszyklus beim Kunden und beinhalten vielseitige Aufgaben wie die Koordination zwischen verschiedenen Teams beim Kunden, bei SAP und SAP Partner. 

Dabei stellt er sicher, daß kritische Support Meldungen bearbeitet und bei Bedarf auch eskaliert werden. Er kümmert sich um die notwendigen Dokumente, um die Services aus SAP Preferred Success beantragen und liefern zu können.

Im Rahmen von SAP Preferred Success profitieren die Kunden von erweiterten Service-Level-Vereinbarungen (Enhanced SLA), d.h. Supportmeldungen werden vorrangig bearbeitet. Dies gilt für die gesamte Vertragszeit von SAP Preferred Success und damit über jede Phase der Cloud-Lösung.

Im regelmässigen Review Meeting werden dann Fragen beantwortet wie:

  • wo finde ich welche Ressourcen,
  • wie kann ich bestimmte Scope Items aktivieren

Kann Torsten einmal eine Frage nicht direkt beantworten, kümmert er sich um einen Kontakt zu einem passenden SAP-Experten. Bei Bedarf organisiert er dabei auch entsprechende Meetings um einen direkten Austausch zu ermöglichen.

Manchmal hilft es auch schon, dem Kunden zu zeigen, wie sie die bestehenden Services und Ressourcen von SAP am besten nutzen. Wie zum Beispiel die SAP Preferred Success Community, SAP Learning Hub, Whats New Viewer oder das SAP Help Portal.

Strategische Reflektion und Zukunftspläne in gobalen Business Reviews

Strategische Themen finden ihren Platz ein bis zweimal im Jahr in den Business Review Meetings. Dort nimmt das Senior & Executive Management des Kunden und auch die jeweiligen Business Process Owner teil.

Zusammenfassung und Kunden-Feedback

"Dank Torsten und SAP Preferred Success konnte unser Unternehmen den Nutzen der SAP Cloud Lösung voll ausschöpfen" – ist nur eins der Zitate eines zufriedenen Kunden.

So endet ein weiterer erfolgreicher Arbeitstag für Torsten, der Tag für Tag dafür sorgt, dass seine Kunden die gewünschten Resultate erzielen.  

Wir hoffen, damit einen kleinen Einblick in die Welt des Managen von SAP Cloud Software und SAP Preferred Success gegeben zu haben. Weitere Informationen finden Sie auf der SAP Preferred Success Website. Kontaktieren Sie uns gerne hier bei weiteren Fragen.

entry.title: New Continuous Quality Check (CQC) for Deployment Readiness for SAP Customer Data Cloud
entry.content:
In this era of severe competition and rapid technological changes, it's time to bring the best out of your SAP applications. We're thrilled to announce that come January 31st, 2024, Continuous Quality Check (CQC) for Deployment Readiness for Customer Data Cloud will be live and available for SAP Enterprise Support Customers.

With the new CQC for Deployment Readiness, let us mitigate the risks and ensure a seamless start of your production. This  CQC is specifically tailored to conduct comprehensive audits of your Customer Data Cloud settings before your system goes live. This  service takes place remotely, and it's been carefully engineered to identify potential pitfalls and proactively address them prior to deployment.

The new CQC for Deployment Readiness rigorously reviews your solution settings to uncover any vulnerabilities or potential challenges that could arise during deployment. Additionally, it furnishes you with recommendations for optimal configurations based on best practices, enhancing your abilities to make informed decisions.

Benefits of this service:

  1. Identification of potential risks, issues, and concerns before your system goes live.
  2. Assurance of a smooth transition into production by performing intricate reviews of your current settings.
  3. Provision of a detailed service report. This report highlights crucial areas for consideration, and offers knowledgeable recommendations following industry best practices.

Service Provision Methods:

  1. The best method is to directly reach out to your SAP Support representative, who can arrange the CQC services on your behalf.
  2. For customers or partners unassigned to an SAP Support representative, services can be requested through our innovative "Get Support" application in SAP for Me (refer to SAP Note 1296527)

                          - Remote Services can be requested via the new Get Support application in SAP for Me (SAP Note 1296527). When submitting your request, please select:

                                          Product: “Continuous Quality Check & Improvement Services”                                                                        Product function: “Service request for a Cloud Solution”

                         - If you need assistance in submitting your case, you may contact your local Customer Interaction Center (CIC).

                         - SAP recommends service booking of six (6) weeks prior to go-live date in order for the service to be delivered four (4) weeks before your go-live date

Check the infosheet detail available or the CQC support portal and the Continuous Quality Check & Improvement Services in the support portal

For any assistance you may need in submitting your service request, don't hesitate to contact your regional Customer Interaction Center (CIC).

Any questions? Please, contact the Value map team! 

 

Mónica Domingo

Global Topic Owner - SAP Customer Experience Solutions

entry.title: Check out the latest SAP Sales Cloud V2 and Service Cloud V2 Learning Journeys
entry.content:
Dear customers, 

We are pleased to announce the release of two brand new Learning Journeys that have been added to the SAP CX Value Map.

SAP Learning Journeys are comprehensive guides designed by SAP to help individuals, teams, and organizations acquire the necessary skills and knowledge to effectively use SAP solutions. These learning journeys provide a structured path for learners to follow, guiding them through a series of learning resources, training modules, and hands-on experiences.

Embrace Innovation with SAP Sales Cloud V2: SAP Sales Cloud V2 represents the epitome of innovation in the realm of sales management. Whether you're a seasoned sales professional or just stepping into the dynamic world of sales, our Learning Journey for SAP Sales Cloud V2 is crafted to guide you through the intricacies of this powerful platform.

Elevate Customer Experiences with SAP Service Cloud V2: In the realm of customer service, SAP Service Cloud V2 stands out as a game-changer. Elevate your understanding and proficiency in customer service management with our thoughtfully designed Learning Journey.

You can access each of the Learning Journeys below.

SAP Service Cloud V2

SAP Sales Cloud V2

Embark on Your Learning Journey Today:

As we unveil these new Learning Journeys for SAP Sales Cloud V2 and SAP Service Cloud V2, we invite you to embark on a transformative learning experience. Stay ahead of the curve, enhance your skill set, and position yourself as a leader in your industry.

Sign up for the SAP Enterprise Support value maps by requesting access to SAP Learning Hub or join the SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps Learning Room if you already have access.

Unlock the doors to innovation and excellence. Start your Learning Journey with us today!

Mónica Domingo

GTO CX Value map

entry.title: SAP MaxAttention Innovation Workshop "Accelerate Business Transformation with AI" (March 12, 2024)
entry.content:
Virtual

March 12, 2024

Agenda

Dear Valued Customer,

We are pleased to invite you to the SAP MaxAttention Innovation Workshop focusing on ’Accelerate Business Transformation with AI’ taking place virtually on March 12, 2024. Please find the current agenda for the workshop here.

Embark on an enlightening journey with our upcoming workshop, where we will dive into cutting-edge topics such as SAP Generative AI, SAP AI assistant Joule, and leveraging AI to augment existing business processes. Discover the profound impact AI can have on reshaping and optimizing your digital core.

Explore the vast potential and advantages of utilizing SAP AI as SAP BTP Cloud Service, unlocking new possibilities for innovation and efficiency. Uncover how SAP AI technologies can be seamlessly integrated into your workflows, providing unprecedented insights and automation that drive business success.

Our workshop is designed to showcase the transformative power of Artificial Intelligence, emphasizing its crucial role in staying competitive and future ready. Understand how SAP AI not only enhances decision-making processes but also enables organizations to adapt and thrive in dynamic and competitive markets.

Join us to gain valuable insights into the strategic use of AI and learn how these technologies can empower your organization to stay at the forefront of industry trends. Don't miss the opportunity to explore the limitless possibilities SAP AI presents for reshaping the way you do business and securing a competitive edge in today's rapidly evolving intelligent enterprise.

Our Workshops

These sessions and workshop series focus on a specific topic and the purpose is to enable our customers to understand the product portfolio and innovative technologies of SAP in order to drive adoption and consumption. As specifically now, it is more important than ever to help companies to be successful and to respond to changing markets by transforming into intelligent enterprises in the experience economy.

The health and well-being of our customers, employees, and business partners is a top priority for SAP. As a response to the restrictions regarding travel and physical events caused by COVID-19, we offer a virtual event format which allows you to have an interactive, digital experience in a safe environment.

Engage with us - Register for this workshop

In case you want to register for this workshop please reach out to maxattention@sap.com.

Your feedback

Feel free to share your feedback and thoughts in the comment section below.

entry.title: SAP Premium Engagement Session "Clean Core and Extensibility" (March 14, 2024)
entry.content:
Virtual

March 14, 2024

Agenda

Dear Valued Customers,

We are pleased to invite you to the next SAP Premium Engagement Session focusing on ’Clean Core and Extensibility’ taking place virtually on Thursday, March 14, 2024. Please find the current agenda here.

Our Workshops

These sessions and workshop series focus on a specific topic and the purpose is to enable our customers to understand the product portfolio and innovative technologies of SAP in order to drive adoption and consumption. As specifically now, it is more important than ever to help companies to be successful and to respond to changing markets by transforming into intelligent enterprises in the experience economy.

The health and well-being of our customers, employees, and business partners is a top priority for SAP. As a response to the restrictions regarding travel and physical events caused by COVID-19, we offer a virtual event format which allows you to have an interactive, digital experience in a safe environment.

Engage with us - Register for this workshop

In case you want to register for this workshop please reach out to maxattention@sap.com

Your feedback

Feel free to share your feedback and thoughts in the comment section below.

entry.title: How to Explore and Understand SAP Signavio Process Insights, Discovery Edition
entry.content:
Dear community,

as you were already informed, Process Discovery on Spotlight and SAP Innovation and Optimization Pathfinder on Spotlight, very popular transformation offerings, cannot be requested any more and the Spotlight content will be discontinued by end of March 2024. 

SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition is the successor of these offerings.
It serves as the perfect starting point to kick-start your transformation project with updated content or uncover our brand-new Artificial Intelligence recommendations that will help you to discover the value of AI in your business.

To familiarize yourself and increase your knowledge with SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition as efficiently as possible, please make sure to register for:

  • The upcoming empowerment webcast called Meet-the-Expert session (registration links follow in the table below)
  • The business process transformation value map and the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition value map  or the SAP S/4HANA value map

Before you can access the links below, a one-time registration in the SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support, is required. A detailed step-by-step guide to registration can be found here.

Do you want to stay up to date on further training and enablement offerings? -> Remember to subscribe to our monthly SAP Enterprise Support Academy newsletter: Subscribe here

Dates:Target Audience:Time:Registration:
March 6th, 2024APJ/EMEA9:00am - 10:30am CETRegister here
March 6th, 2024NA/LA/EMEA10:00am - 11:30am ESTRegister here

To learn further details about SAP Signavio Process Insights, Discovery edition and about the upcoming Meet-the-Expert session – continue reading:

What you can expect from the new offering:

  • Unique tailored insights into your current operational business process performance, based on data from your SAP ERP or SAP S/4HANA system
  • Specific insights and recommendations are segmented by line of business and end-to-end processes
  • More functionalities, automation, intelligent technologies, SAP Fiori apps and all the SAP cloud solutions with SAP S/4HANA
  • Build your case for SAP S/4HANA in SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition and secure the buy-in from the business
  • Free of charge*

What is new?

  • Root cause analysis and detailed information about indicators of performance of your processes
  • Filtering capabilities
  • Detailed list of documents
  • Blockers and typical process break points (for one process flow)
  • Value analysis with estimated monetary benefits
  • Choose 1 out of 3 process flows

The following goals will be discussed:

  • During the session you will learn how to explore and understand SAP Signavio Process Insights, Discovery Edition results.

entry.title: Generative KI im SAP Change und Training – Recap der Kaffee Ecke mit Gerd Stumm
entry.content:
Gerd Stumm, Learning Innovation Lead bei SAP hat in der Kaffee Ecke im Februar über den Einsatz von generativer KI bei SAP intern berichtet. Zu Beginn haben wir die Erfahrungen der Teilnehmenden mit dem Einsatz von KI im Lernen abgefragt. Die Antworten waren sehr vielfältig, von  

  • auf der grünen Wiese 🙂 
  • Co Pilot für schneller als SAP4Me Hilfe 
  • ChatGPT für bessere Texte oder Beurteilung von Inhalten 
  • Experimentieren mit KI zum Support bei der Trainingserstellung und Durchführen 
  • zum Erstellen von Lernformaten, zb. Descript, eine Software, mit der sich AI basiert Schulungsvideos erstellen lassen 

Warum generative KI für das Lernen einsetzen? 

Im Anschluss hat Gerd dann über Beispiele aus seinem Arbeitsalltag gesprochen. Dabei ging er zunächst darauf ein, welche Prämissen für ihn in seiner Rolle bei dem Einsatz generativer KI relevant sind: 

Da er mit seinen KollegInnen für die Lerninhalte für ca. 20.000 Lernende im Bereich Cloud Success Services bei SAP verantwortlich ist, ist das Thema Skalierung sehr wichtig.  

Dann ging Gerd darauf ein, was SAP im Bereich generative KI Tools für die Mitarbeitenden anbietet: 

  • Eigenentwicklung eines Playgrounds, eher für Entwickler mit einem Zugang zu 20 Large Language Models (LLM) – nur interne Nutzung 
  • der Playground wird demnächst durch das SAP AI Launchpad abgelöst, das auch BTP Kunden zur Verfügung steht 
  • GPT4 in einer internen Version (wie ChatGPT, nur ohne Rückfluss der Infos) mit verschiedenen Varianten incl. Plugins 

Use Cases von generativer KI im SAP Learning und Lessons Learned 

Danach berichtete Gerd von Use Cases, mit denen er und seine KollegInnen im letzten Jahr experimentiert haben: 

  • Erstellung von Transkripten von Videos über Kaltura. Aus den Transkripten wurden mit einem sehr großen Prompt, einem sog. Megaprompt, Dokumente und Aktivitäten erzeugt, z.B. eine Summary, Quotes, Fragen  
    Gerds Fazit hierzu war, dass das Vorgehen bei den Videos viel Zeitersparnis birgt. Schon beim ersten Mal, bei dem das Team noch am Lernen war, haben sie mind. 10-15% Zeit gespart 
  • Zudem wurde noch ein Student Workbook zur Vertiefung der Lerninhalte erstellt mit einer Business Story (analog einer Case Study) sowie die Erstellung von Aufgaben und Übungen über die KI 
  • Gerd berichtete von der Nutzung des internen GPT4 als Lerncoach mit einem Sokratischen Dialog: Das Ziel hierbei ist eher Reflexion: Durch Prompt agiert die KI als Wissenscoach und das eigene Wissen wird durch die Fragen der KI reflektiert 
     
  • Ein weiterer Usecase war die Nutzung von GPT für die Erstellung von Rollenspielen und Simulationen mit Hilfe von Prompts, z.B. für eine Objection Handling Übung. Bei Gerds Beispiel war interessant, dass es eine Personalisierung und Emotionalisierung der Antworten gab („Wie heisst du?“ und Ansprache mit Namen sowie der Einsatz von Emojis und motivierender Sprache) 
  • Ein weiteres Beispiel war die Nutzung von AI als Tutor: Lernende geben eine Antwort auf eine Frage ein und die AI prüft es gegen eine Musterlösung. Dabei wurde diskutiert, dass es die nicht-deterministischen Anworten der KI ähnlich zu beurteilen sind wie die subjektiven Bewertungen eines Menschen 
  • Ein für Gerd wichtiger Use Case ist die Nutzung von Tools (in seinem Fall Synthesia) für den Einsatz Text zu Video, da es gerade in seinem Kontext viel Potential für Produktivitätssteigerung bietet  

 

  • Erstellung von Videos mit Avataren aus Texten (inkl. PPTs) und Sprachgenerierung in fast beliebigen Sprachen.  
  • Zum Beispiel wurde aus einer Präsentation ein Flipped Classroom generiert mit einem Video.  
  • Oder er hat ein Lernprogramm mit Avataren im SAP Branding mit einem SAP Hintergrund erstellt. 
  • Ein weiteres Szenario war die Aktualisierung eines veralteten Videos (mit einer ausgeschiedenen Person als Speaker, die durch einen Avatar ersetzt wurde) 
  • Bei Custom Avataren waren sich die Teilnehmenden einig, dass dies eine intensive Diskussion über Ethik und Moral benötigt und die Gefahr von Deepfakes nicht zu unterschätzen ist. Thematisch ist an der Stelle auch der Übergang in die Gaming Welt und ins Metaverse. 
  • Zusammenfassend war der Einsatz von Text zu Video Tools sehr einfach und sehr gut gerade da Übersetzungen und Updates sehr einfach möglich sind. 

Wie geht die Reise mit generativer KI weiter? 

Abschließend hat Gerd noch einen Ausblick gegeben, was dieses Jahr auf seiner Roadmap steht. Dazu gehört  

  • Wie kann man Prompts stukturieren/katalogisieren? 
  • Chatbot, der auf beliebige Dokumente zugreift 
  • UI (Benutzeroberfläche) benutzerfreundlicher machen 
  • UX für die Lernenden verbessern 
  • MS Copilot: KI kann im Workflow direkt benutzt werden (in Teams, Outlook, Word etc.) 

 Nächste Events der SAP Training und Change Community 

Zum Schluss haben wir noch zu den nächsten Events eingeladen: 

  • CLC Promptaton - ein hybrider Hackathon für Prompts im Lern-Kontext 
  • zur nächsten Kaffee Ecke zum Thema Trainingsbedarfe erfassen 
  • SAP Training and Adoption Forum – Anmeldung ist jetzt schon offen 
  • In der aktuellen Folge des Education Newscast geht es um Effektive Prompts für KI Chatbots - Hier reinhören 

Wir freuen uns über eure Kommentare und natürlich wenn wir uns bei einer nächsten Kaffee-Ecke treffen.

entry.title: Support Accreditation: Introduction to Unit 1 & 2
entry.content:
The updated Support Accreditation was launched early December 2023, with customers and partners gaining valuable knowledge on support from SAP.  It is a self-enablement course.  Once completed, customers and partners are better equipped to choose the most efficient way to interact with support from SAP.

 

To get a better understanding of the course let’s take a closer look at the flow and content of the course.  It is broken down into logical units and lessons, each with a distinctive aim.  It provides participants with a complete overview of SAP’s support channels and tools; how and when to use them.

Today I want to introduce the first two units.

Using Self-Service and Case Prevention

We start with an overall view of support from SAP.  The first three lessons highlight the major support touchpoints with the subsequent lessons focusing on self-enablement.

The major touchpoints we have are SAP for Me (newest central entry point for SAP support), SAP Support Portal (latest support news and information on offerings, programs, and services) and Communities (gaining expert advice and answers to how-to and consulting queries).

With regards to self-enablement, we feature options like Product Knowledge and a lesson on the Scope of Support (what cases are under the remit of SAP’s support). 

Finally, we introduce the extensive Knowledge Base (services such as SAP Knowledge Base articles and SAP Notes), Guided Answers (step-by-step troubleshooting for technical issues), Support Assistant (assisting with case creation) and Support Log Assistant (analyzing support files, providing recommendations).

Learning About Live Support Channels

The course switches to the one-to-one or Real-Time interactions with support from SAP.  Here we assist in creating the ‘perfect’ case with additional support options to interact more closely with support professionals.

We start with the ‘Get Support’ application which guides you to solve your technical issues real-time or (if necessary) direct you to an SAP expert. Built-In-Support provides a personalized support experience based on interpreting your issue using machine learning and AI.

Next, we focus on Real-Time Support channels: Expert Chat provides one-to-one interaction with support experts. Another option is Schedule a Manager, a 15-minute call with a support manager or finally Ask an Expert Peer, which is a one-on-one interaction with qualified and approved experts external to SAP.

We round off Unit 2 with a comprehensive overview of the Customer Interaction Center (CIC), available 24/7/365 for assistance with non-technical issues.  Incident Solution Matching helps customers get answers to technical issues by suggesting solutions based on case data.

Course in a Nutshell (Units 1 & 2)

To summarize we have the following key topics:

Unit 1:

  • SAP for Me, SAP Support Portal and SAP Community
  • Product Knowledge, Scope of Support, Knowledge Base,
  • Guided Answers, Support Assistant and Log Assistant

Unit 2:

  • ‘Get Support’ Application and Built-In-Support
  • Expert Chat, Schedule and Expert, Schedule a Manger, Ask a Peer,
  • Customer Interaction Center and Incident Solution Matching

Curious to learn more? Get active and start your training today!  - Support Accreditation

Part 2 of the Support Accreditation introduction will follow soon.

entry.title: SAP MaxAttention Innovation Workshop 'Accelerate Clean Core Journey' (March 19, 2024)
entry.content:
Onsite at SAP America’s Headquarters

3999 West Chester Pike, Newtown Square, PA 19073

March 19, 2024

Agenda

Dear Valued Customer,

We are pleased to invite you to the SAP MaxAttention Innovation Workshop focusing on ‘Accelerate your journey to Clean Core with SAP MaxAttention’ taking place on-site on March 19, 2024. Please find the current agenda here.

In this workshop, you will learn about

  • Definition and dimensions of clean core (Business Processes, Extensibility, Integration, Data and Operations)
  • KPI’s for the respective dimensions and value aspects
  • Tools and MaxAttention services that will help drive and govern your journey to clean core

For customers planning their transformation to SAP S/4HANA, customers who are already live on SAP S/4HANA carrying over the technical debt from ECC or customers who implemented SAP S/4HANA as a re-implementation or a greenfield implementation, this is an opportunity to become cloud ready and run with cloud compliant extensions and customizations to

  • Provide flexibility to adopt to changing business requirements with modular innovation and functionality decoupled from the core
  • Ease of upgrade: Make upgrades non-events from a custom code point of view
  • TCO: efficient use of infrastructure and licenses
  • Promoting fit-to-standard compliance with clean core modular innovation
  • Future proof and cloud ready solution

The workshop followed by a dinner, is a great opportunity to meet colleagues from other companies and key representatives from SAP.

Engage with us - Register for this workshop

In case you want to register for this workshop or need any further information please reach out to maxattention@sap.com

Your feedback

Feel free to share your feedback and thoughts in the comment section below.

entry.title: Support Accreditation: Introduction to Unit 3 Explaining SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
This is the second post of the blog series which introduce the newly updated self-enablement course: Support Accreditation. You may have already checked out the previous blog post: Support Accreditation: Introduction to Unit 1 & 2. Today I want to introduce Unit 3: Explaining SAP Cloud ALM.

This unit introduces SAP Cloud ALM, the application lifecycle management platform for SAP solutions. Through this unit, customers and partners will learn how they can benefit from an out-of-the-box, native cloud solution designed as the central entry point to manage their SAP landscape with content-driven guided implementation and highly automated operations

The unit starts by highlighting the value and importance of #SAP Cloud ALM# and how it realizes the value chains of Implementation, Operations, and Services. It also explains how you can fully leverage the benefits of SAP Cloud ALM through the comprehensive support provided by SAP Enterprise Support

In the next lesson, it delves into how SAP Cloud ALM supports Implementation with its core capabilities such as Process Management, Requirement Realization, Project and Task Management, Test Management, Change and Deployment Management, and Solution Documentation. It also highlights the built-in integration with SAP Activate and other tools like SAP for ME and Central Business Configuration. Additionally, it provides details on the extensibility of SAP Cloud ALM through the API Catalog during the Implementation phases. This section concludes with Partner Strategy and opportunities for extending SAP Cloud ALM.

For operations, SAP Cloud ALM ensures business continuity, enhances operational efficiency, predicts critical situations, provides real-time status events for business services, and reduces the total cost of ownership (TCO). In this lesson, we explain how SAP Cloud ALM achieves these goals through a detailed introduction to the Operations functional overview. It also introduces the onboarding and configuration guidance for SAP Cloud ALM for operations.

Course in a Nutshell (Unit 3):

To summarize we have the following key points:

Unit 3

  • Explain the purpose and significance of SAP Cloud ALM
  • Explain how SAP Cloud ALM contributes to SAP project implementations
  • Explain how SAP Cloud ALM contributes to SAP solution operations

Curious to learn more? Get active and start your training today!  - Support Accreditation

Part 3 of the Support Accreditation introduction will follow soon.

For other SAP Cloud ALM related learning offerings, always stay tuned with SAP Cloud ALM Learning Portal.

entry.title: Unlock the Future of SAP: Don't Miss These Sessions at SAP Sapphire 2024!
entry.content:
Get ready for SAP Sapphire 2024! We're thrilled to unveil an incredible lineup of sessions that promise to revolutionize the way you leverage SAP technology. Join us in Orlando, USA from June 3 to June 5, 2024, for an unforgettable experience packed with insights, innovations, and opportunities for growth. Here's a sneak peek at some of the sessions you won't want to miss:

SER207 Translating Generative AI and LLMs into Business Benefits
Explore how generative AI and large language models (LLMs) are reshaping customer support offerings, enhancing internal efficiencies, and accelerating the customer experience. Learn about the design, implementation, and integration of LLMs to elevate your support capabilities to new heights.

SER205 “SAP for Me”: Bundles Unleashed
Discover the power of bundles in the “SAP for Me” portal, revolutionizing the way businesses manage cloud services on SAP Business Technology Platform. Learn how intuitive management and customer-centric language empower businesses to grasp the full value of their cloud services, driving efficiency and productivity.

SER202 Reinventing Support with AI
Dive into how intelligent automation and AI are transforming support offerings to deliver unparalleled customer experiences. Gain insights into predictive, bi-directional support and explore our journey towards delivering outstanding value to customers.

SER201 Unlocking Growth: Air Liquide's Success with SAP Cloud ALM
Learn how Air Liquide Advanced Materials leverages SAP Cloud ALM to support end-to-end business processes, driving improvement opportunities, change management, and user adoption through quantifiable process performance.

SER204: SAP Cloud ALM for operations at Brightspeed
Discover the value-driven benefits Internet provider Brightspeed experienced using SAP Cloud ALM for operations. Learn how the company uses the offering in areas from business process monitoring, integration, and exception monitoring to job, automation, and health monitoring.

SER206 Migrating to SAP S/4HANA: Confident Data Transition
Unlock value in transitioning to SAP S/4HANA with the SAP Business Transformation Center solution. Explore selective data-transition intricacies and accelerate your journey with smooth data transformation.

SER203 Release the Value of AI in Your Business Transformation
Witness the transformative power of AI integration into business processes, demonstrated by our customer support team. Explore the tangible value AI brings to your digital transformation journey through SAP Signavio solutions.

SER200 Empowering Your Cloud Journey: Unleashing Transformation with SAP Cloud ALM
Create momentum in your move to the cloud with SAP Cloud ALM. Discover how our partner ecosystem supports your transition and explore the transformation-suite approach to boosting your change process.

SER227 Optimizing Innovation: Roadmap for SAP Cloud ALM
Gain insights into adopting clean core principles, managing extensions, and enabling efficient operations with SAP Cloud ALM. Explore integration with SAP Business AI solutions and make a plan to transition from SAP Solution Manager.

These sessions promise to deliver invaluable insights and practical strategies to drive innovation, efficiency, and success in your SAP journey. Don't miss out on this opportunity to unlock the full potential of SAP technology and propel your business forward. And remember, our executives and experts will be available within the SAP Services and Support Center onsite at the event. Don't miss the chance to engage with them directly. Get registered now. Book your appointment in advance! See you at SAP Sapphire 2024!

entry.title: SAP Premium Engagement Session 'A new SAP UX experience utilizing the BTP platform' (April 11, 2024
entry.content:
Virtual

April 11, 2024

Agenda 

Dear Valued Customer,

We are pleased to invite you to the next SAP Premium Engagement Session focusing on ‘A new SAP UX experience utilizing the BTP platform’ taking place virtually on Thursday, April 11, 2024. Please find the current Agenda here.

In this event we will discuss how to do SAP UX adoption planning, use of methodology and how to roll-out SAP Fiori with high adoption rates. Further, we will explore the SAP Build Work Zone which provides a central access to multiple cloud and on-premise systems and last but not least how SAP Premium Engagements can support you on your journey to developing a SAP UX Strategy and getting started with the SAP Build Work Zone.

Engage with us - Register for this workshop

In case you want to register for this workshop or need any further information please reach out to maxattention@sap.com

Your feedback

Feel free to share your feedback and thoughts in the comment section below.

entry.title: SAP Cloud Acceleration: Ihr Personal Training für die Cloud
entry.content:
Wie schaffen es Organisationen das Maximale aus ihrem Cloud Investment zu ziehen und welche Unterstützung wünschen sie sich?

Um dies beantworten zu können ist es wichtig, die Kundenanforderung in der Cloud genau zu kennen. Wie? Natürlich indem man die Kunden direkt befragt.

Deshalb haben wir uns gemeinsam mit dem IT Onlinemagazin entschieden, eine Umfrage zu starten, um diese Bedarfe zu erfragen.

Zentrale Wünsche unserer Kunden:

Persönlicher Ansprechpartner

Der zentrale Wunsch ist ein persönlichen Ansprechpartner. Dieser ist sowohl mit der individuellen Kundensituation vertraut und kann mit seiner Expertise rund um die Cloud-Lösungen die Anforderungen des Kunden und die Potentiale der Cloud Lösung optimal zusammenführen.

Hilfestellung bei Release Updates

Kunden wünschen sich Hilfe bei der Beantwortung der Frage, welche neuen Funktionalitäten es im Rahmen der Release Updates gibt und wie diese zeitnah und wertsteigernd für das Unternehmen eingesetzt werden können.

Maßgeschneiderte Lernangebote für die Mitarbeitenden

Die Mitarbeitenden (Projektteams und Enduser) sind der zentrale Erfolgsfaktor einer Transformation. Sie müssen die neuen Prozesse verstehen und die entsprechende Software bedienen können.

Kurze Antwortzeiten im Bedarfsfall

Herausforderungen und Probleme bedürfen zeitnaher Lösungen. Kurze Antwortzeiten im Bedarfsfall sind ein weiterer Wunsch unserer Kunden.

Optimierung des Anwendungsbetriebs

Mitarbeitende in wertsteigernden Tätigkeiten (z.B. Optimierung der Geschäftsprozesse) einzusetzen, hat für die Unternehmen Priorität. Im Rahmen des Fachkräftemangels ist es der Wunsch, die Mitarbeitenden im Bereich des Anwendungsbetriebs zu entlasten, um  Kapazitäten für die Einführung von Innovationen frei zu machen.

Wie können diese Kundenwünsche für Erfolg in der Cloud nun am besten umgesetzt werden?

Ähnlich wie im Sport bedarf es für den maximalen Erfolg einen auf sie zugeschnittenen Plan, sowie Unterstützung durch Experten, die Sie auf dem Weg zum Erfolg begleiten.

Dadurch wird sichergestellt, dass ihre individuellen Ziele erreicht, sowie alle notwendigen Maßnahmen auf dem Weg dorthin beschrieben sind. Dies garantiert maximalen Erfolg in kürzester Zeit.

Was ist SAP Cloud Acceleration?

Vereinfacht ausgedrückt ist SAP Cloud Acceleration Ihr Personal Training für die Cloud.

Ob gemeinsame Analyse der Ausgangslage, Entwicklung Ihres individuellen Erfolgsplans unter Berücksichtigung Ihrer individuellen Ziele, Einführung neuer Funktionalitäten oder Erstellung passender Trainingspläne für Ihre Experten und Endanwender bis hin zur Optimierung Ihres Anwendungsbetriebs – wir unterstützen Sie in allen Phasen und verhindern so falsche Weichenstellungen. Somit arbeiten wir mit Ihnen gemeinsam daran, das volle Potential Ihres Cloud Investments optimal und somit schneller und besser zu entfalten.

Was sind die Erfolgsfaktoren von SAP Cloud Acceleration ?

  • Lassen Sie uns bei der Sportanalogie bleiben und versuchen, diese Frage durch den Vergleich mit einem Personal Trainer im Fitnessstudio zu beantworten. Der Personal Trainer im Sport ist bei SAP Cloud Acceleration der Customer Success Partner (CSP). Er ist ihr zentraler Ansprechpartner rund um Ihre Cloud Lösung.
  • Der Trainingsplan im Sport heißt bei SAP Cloud Acceleration Success Plan. In diesem werden die relevanten Maßnahmen zur Erreichung Ihrer Geschäftsziele definiert.
  • Für körperliche Fitness und ein ganzheitliches Wohlbefinden benötigt man unterschiedliche Experten. Dies kann der Physiotherapeut oder der Ernährungsberater im Sport sein. Im Rahmen der Nutzung Ihrer Cloudlösung sind dies weitere Technik- oder Produktexperten. Dieses Netzwerk an Experten koordiniert der Customer Success Partner für Sie. Somit profitieren Sie von Expertenwissen, wann immer sie es brauchen.
  • Neue Erkenntnisse im Sport führen zu einer Optimierung der Trainingsmethoden. Dies gilt auch für Cloudlösungen. Diese unterliegen ebenfalls einer ständigen Optimierung, welche mit Hilfe von Release-updates unseren Kunden zur Verfügung gestellt werden. Welche neuen Funktionalitäten hieraus wertsteigernd für Ihre Ziele eingesetzt werden können, bespricht ihr Customer Success Partner mit Ihnen.
  • Bei Herausforderungen, welche zeitnah einer Lösung bedürfen, können Sie sich auf eine schnelle Reaktion und Hilfe anhand optimierter Service Level Agreements verlassen.
  • Um Ihre Ziele zu erreichen, benötigen sie ein fittes bzw. gut ausgebildetes Team. Wir stellen Ihnen mit dem SAP Learning Hub eine Lernplattform zur Verfügung, die Ihr Projektteam mit einer maßgeschneiderten Ausbildung zu allen relevanten Themen versorgt, um dies zu erreichen. Mit SAP Enable Now können Sie zudem Dokumentation und Training für Enduser erstellen und anpassen.  SAP Enable Now sind unterstützende Inhalte, die in die Anwendung integriert sind und den Benutzern überall und jederzeit zur Verfügung stehen, um die Benutzerakzeptanz und Produktivität zu steigern.
  • Lassen Sie Ihre Mitarbeiter das tun, was Sie am besten können – die Arbeit mit dem Kunden. Wir kümmern uns darum, dass ihr Anwendungsbetrieb optimal funktioniert. Durch die Unterstützung des Anwendungsbetriebs und der Einführung von Innovationen hilft Ihnen SAP Cloud Application Services dabei, Ihre Mitarbeiter zu entlasten und sich auf die wertsteigenden Tätigkeiten (z.B. Optimierung Ihrer Geschäftsprozesse) zu konzentrieren.

 

Abbildung: Überblick Erfolgskomponenten SAP Cloud Acceleration und SAP Portfolio

Welche quantifizierbaren Mehrwerte liefert SAP Cloud Acceleration?

Eine speziell für diesen Fall in Auftrag gegebene Forrester Studie zeigt, dass SAP Cloud Acceleration die Implementierung um 10% beschleunigt.

Weitere Vorteile sind:

  • Eine um 10% schnellere Wertschöpfung
  • Eine um 24% gesteigerte Produktivität
  • Das Release-Management wird 25% schneller
  • Die Geschäftsprozess-Effizienz wird um 30% verbessert

Was sagen unsere Kunden?

„Durch den SAP Preferred Success Service ist unsere Implementierung innerhalb von 6 Monaten möglich geworden. Die Effizienzsteigerung ist enorm.“

Alexander Nieswandt
Gründer und Geschäftsführer,
WhiteWall Media GmbH

„Die Entscheidung unseres CFO für SAP Preferred Success war sehr gut und wichtig, da wir das Projekt nur mit unseren eigenen Kapazitäten vermutlich nicht geschafft hätten.“ Video

Jochen Trefzger
Senior Consultant,
Detecon International GmbH

Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam das volle Potential Ihres Cloud Investments optimieren. Kommen Sie gerne auf uns zu bei Fragen oder falls Sie weitere Information möchten.

e-Mail

SAP Cloud Acceleration Webcast Serie

SAP Cloud Acceleration on sap.com

entry.title: A day in the life of a Customer Success Partner – helping customers on their cloud journey
entry.content:
Before we start: Our main protagonist Torsten

Torsten is a 35-year-old engaged SAP Customer Success Partner (CSP) for a major automotive supplier. He is a dedicated and tech-savvy professional who acts as an intermediary between SAP and the customer. His main goal is to ensure the smooth implementation of the customer’s cloud solutions and their optimal operation. In doing so, he uses a variety of SAP tools and services and regularly agrees with the customer. His activities run under the SAP Preferred Success cloud service. I thought sharing Thorsten’s story is a good illustration how SAP Cloud Services look like in real life.

Figure: Illustration of different activities in SAP Preferred Success

Preparation with Onboarding and Cloud Mindset Workshop

The day starts with the activities around onboarding the customer. Torsten ensures that the customer has access to all relevant resources. The customer gets everything he & she need to be successful independently. In addition, after onboarding, the customer knows how to contact Torsten and how to tackle open topics together.

As part of the onboarding, the cornerstone for the collaboration between the Customer Success Partner and the customer is fixed. The first regular dates and synch-meetings are set.

The Cloud Mindset Workshop is the entry point to the world of SAP Preferred Success services. Together, the cultural and organizational change that forms the basis for the successful implementation and operation of SAP cloud solutions is reflected here. Mindset stands for values, beliefs, norms which influence our behaviors. Working with Cloud Software due to the different nature of cloud compared to on-premise software needs a change in mindset. For further reading see this whitepaper from SAPs Change Management team.

Learning Recommendations to develop SAP Knowledge

With SAP Preferred Success, the customer receives five licenses from the SAP Learning Hub, the comprehensive learning platform for SAP products and technologies. Torsten ensures that the customer uses these licenses optimally. He recommends appropriate learning content, learning paths, live-sessions, training systems and/or certifications. For SAP Preferred Success there is even an own learning portal with communities by Edition and learning content around the SAP Preferred Success Services.  

Support the implementation of SAP cloud solutions

In the implementation phase of a SAP Cloud solution, Torsten offers a number of services, including solution launch checks related to integration, extensibility, identity & access management, embedded analytics, UX exploration, or SAP Cloud ALM. He can select them from a service catalog as required by his customer. Torsten wants to achieve a smooth implementation process and an optimal go-live in cooperation with the customer.

The regular cycle of adoption, operation & optimization

Software features must be reliable. At the same time, existing and new features must adapt to the changing needs of an organization. For this purpose, new features and options are constantly being rolled out over regular releases. 

Depending on the customer’s needs, Torsten also introduces additional tools and resources, such as the Release Adoption and Scope Dependency Tool (RASD). Or he uses other services such as guidance for regression tests or support for a post-upgrade test.

Individual SAP Preferred Success Services tailored to each phase and situation

Torsten provides specific services and checks based on the customer’s phase and requirement. These include Q-Gate Review Sessions, various checks such as Continuous Quality Checks (CQCs) or Solution Launch Checks.

In addition, there can always be customer-specific ad hoc advisory sessions where Torsten can access an entire catalog. Depending on the cloud solution, these services may also vary.

360 degree care with SAP Preferred Success

Torsten plays a very similar role to a concierge service or a personal trainer. His activities span the entire solution life cycle at the customer and include diverse tasks such as coordination between different teams at the customer, at SAP, and at SAP partners. 

He ensures that critical support messages are processed and, if necessary, escalated. He also takes care of the necessary documents and forms to request and deliver SAP Preferred Success services.

As part of SAP Preferred Success, customers benefit from enhanced service level agreements (enhanced SLA), i.e. support messages are processed with priority. This applies to the entire SAP Preferred Success contract period and therefore to each phase of the cloud solution.

In the regular review meeting, he discusses questions such as:

  • Where can I find what resources?
  • How can I activate specific scope items?

If Torsten cannot answer a question directly, he contacts a suitable SAP expert. If necessary, he also organizes appropriate meetings to enable the discussion regarding questions from his customer.

Sometimes it helps to show his customer how to best use SAP’s existing services and resources. For example how to leverage the SAP Preferred Success Community, SAP Learning Hub, Whats New Viewer, or the SAP Help Portal.

Strategic retrospectives and future plans in gobal business reviews

Strategic topics are discussed in the Business Review Meetings once or twice a year. Participants are usually Senior & executive management of the customer and the respective business process owners.

Summary and customer feedback

“Thanks to Torsten and SAP Preferred Success, our company has been able to take full advantage of the SAP Cloud solution” – is just one of the quotes from a satisfied customer.

This concludes another successful working day for Torsten, who ensures that his customers achieve the desired results every day.  

I hope this blog provided you some insights into the world of managing SAP Cloud Software and SAP Preferred Success.

For more information, visit the SAP Preferred Success website. Looking forward for your questions or comments below this blog.

entry.title: Unleashing the Power of Artificial Intelligence in SAP Customer Support
entry.content:
Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized the way businesses operate, opening doors to unprecedented opportunities for innovation and efficiency. Within the realm of customer support at SAP, these cutting-edge technologies play a crucial role in enhancing the customer experience and streamlining support processes.

Customer support is the backbone of any successful business, and at SAP, we understand the importance of delivering exceptional service to our customers. With the help of AI and LLMs, we are transforming our support offerings to provide unparalleled support capabilities and elevate the customer experience to new heights.

One of the key areas where AI and LLMs are making a significant impact is in accelerating response times and resolving customer queries with greater accuracy. Through advanced natural language processing capabilities, AI-powered chatbots can understand and respond to customer inquiries in real-time, providing immediate assistance and reducing the burden on human support agents.

Moreover, AI-driven analytics tools enable us to analyze vast amounts of support data to identify trends, patterns, and recurring issues, allowing us to proactively address customer needs and prevent future problems from occurring. This predictive, bi-directional support approach ensures that customers receive the support they need before they even realize they need it, leading to increased satisfaction and loyalty.

Additionally, AI-powered recommendation engines can suggest relevant solutions and resources to customers based on their specific needs and preferences, further enhancing the support experience and empowering customers to find solutions independently.

It's important to note that SAP's customer support team acts as a trailblazer in leveraging AI and LLMs to improve processes and drive efficiency. By harnessing the full potential of these technologies internally, we not only enhance our own support capabilities but also serve as a blueprint for other SAP customers looking to leverage AI in their own businesses.

As we look ahead to SAP Sapphire 2024, taking place from June 3 to June 5 in Orlando and from June 11 to June 13 in Barcelona, we invite you to join us for sessions that delve deeper into the transformative power of AI in customer support:

Translating Generative AI and LLMs into Business Benefits (Orlando: SER207)
Explore how generative AI and large language models (LLMs) are reshaping customer support offerings, enhancing internal efficiencies, and accelerating the customer experience. Learn about the design, implementation, and integration of LLMs to elevate your support capabilities to new heights.

Reinventing Support with AI (Orlando: SER202 / Barcelona: SER221)
Dive into how intelligent automation and AI are transforming support offerings to deliver unparalleled customer experiences. Gain insights into predictive, bi-directional support and explore our journey towards delivering outstanding value to customers.

Release the Value of AI in Your Business Transformation (Orlando: SER203 / Barcelona: SER222)
Witness the transformative power of AI integration into business processes, demonstrated by our customer support team. Explore the tangible value AI brings to your digital transformation journey through SAP Signavio solutions.

Lookout for the sessions at SAP Sapphire 2024 to discover how AI is reshaping the future of customer support and learn how you can harness its potential to drive success in your own business. Ensure to book some time with our experts within the Services and Support Center at both SAP Sapphire events, Orlando and Barcelona 2024: Register now.

#SAP #ArtificialIntelligence #CustomerSupport #SAPSapphire2024 #Innovation #DigitalTransformation #LargeLanguageModels ##LLMs

entry.title: Try Out the Latest Enhancements in SAP for Me to Better Manage Your Support Cases
entry.content:
We’re delighted to introduce some recent improvements of case management in SAP for Me. These enhancements are based on your valuable feedback, making it easier to navigate and interact with us through the redesigned user interface for case edit and list. Improved features including case quick view, favorite cases, column-based sorting, and auto confirm cases reminder.

Redesigned User Interface for Case Edit

We made some changes to the user interface of the case edit feature. We've introduced a floating pop-up window that enables you to input your information without having to scroll all the way down to the bottom of the case. This saves time and makes case editing simpler.

The 'Reply' button is now always visible, regardless of the tab you're in. This means you can easily update your case at any time, without having to switch tabs. These changes will help to streamline the case editing process and deliver a more seamless experience.

While you’re typing, and if you would like to copy the content of the case body, simply click the ‘Hide’ button, the text will be saved automatically.

The header size has been adjusted giving more space to the case body. The information of header and system information have been put into the ‘Details’ tab.

 

Redesigned User Interface for Case List

1. Case quick view

Clicking on the little ‘i’ icon will take you to the case quick view. Here you can see the latest update, you can close the case directly or click ‘Open Case Details’ for the whole interactions.

2. Favorite Cases

The cases you marked as ‘favorite’ can be shown in the new ‘Favorite’ tab. Saving you time and effort to search for it from the case list.

3. Column-based sorting

You can easily sort your case list by ‘Updated On’, ‘Created On’, or even ‘Auto Confirmation’ date.

4. Auto-Confirm cases reminder

You will notice a reminder if you have cases that will be auto confirm soon. Clicking on ‘View Cases’ will take you to the cases, so that you can either check the reply or close them if the issue has been resolved.

Besides above, now clicking on cases will opening a new browser tab, so that you can simply go back and check other cases from your list.

 

Connected blogs:

  • Customize your own reporting in ‘Customer Insights’ 
  • Ask an Expert Peer is now live in the ‘Get Support’ application in SAP for Me 
  • Leverage the SAP for Me Mobile App | SAP Blogs 
  • Experience the Newly Designed Case List in SAP for Me
  • Why choosing the right system and product will help resolve your product issue faster
  • New ‘Get Support’ Application and Structure of Services & Support Dashboard
  • Goodbye SAP ONE Support Launchpad! Welcome SAP for Me! 
  • Summary Blog: From SAP ONE Support Launchpad to SAP for Me
  • Leverage the brand new ‘Support Knowledge Search’ in SAP for Me

entry.title: Functional Usage for your Public Cloud Products in Customer Insights reporting in SAP for Me
entry.content:
To get an overview on the usage and adoption you can focus on the contractual license consumption or on the functional business usage and see to which extend do you use the functionalities of your purchased public cloud products (see below).

You can access the new Cloud Functional Usage section from the Entry page using the relevant ‘Summary’ card below or by using the section “Cloud Functional Usage” in the Tab Menu.

The functional usage is based on the Solution Capabilities which have been defined to reflect the business functionality.

A Solution Capability describes a functional ability of a single or multiple Software Products that implement and support a Business Capability. A Solution Capability is assigned to at least one product, in some cases to more than one product, e.g. when more than one subscribed product is needed to build up a business functionality.

The measurement values shown here are retrieved from your production systems only. A Solution Capability is considered as Used as soon as there are positive traffic values of mainly documents and/or calls. If there are no positive traffic values of documents and/or calls, a Solution Capability is considered as Non-Used.

 

In the first graph you can see all solution capabilities grouped as “used” and “non-used” displayed per month for max 12 months period. This allows you to see the trend of the functional usage, e.g. whether the usage increases historically or stays as it was at the beginning. Selecting the segment of the column in the graph will show you only Solution Capabilities related to this segment. Note that some functionalities and so also some Solution Capabilities might be used not every month.
The line in the graph displays the relation of the used and non-used Solution Capabilities as functional usage percentage rate for your products. The time frame can be adjusted using the appropriate filter.

In the second graph you see an overview on all available Solution Capabilities as totals for the selected time and grouped by Solution Areas. Within e.g. 6 months it may be the case that a solution area is Used in some of those months, and in other months it’s Non-Used. In this graph you can see the aggregated usage over 6 months. This means that any Solution Capabilities that were used in ANY of the 6 months will count as Used, and only Solution Capabilities that were not used at all within the 6 months will be counted as Non-Used. This graph allows you to see how many Solution Capabilities have not been used at all during the selected period and in which solution areas you could improve the functional usage.

If you would like to visualize the Solution Capabilities which have not been used at all for the selected time you can do it with some small adjustments as explained below.

Example: You see that 3 of 7 Solution capabilities from Learning and Talent have not been used at all during the last 12 months.

 Use the Solution Area filter to select Learning and Talent and reduce the number of entries in the table and in the graph.

 To visualize the capabilities in the graph you can change the graph and display the Solution Capabilities themselves instead of showing how many of them have not been used during the last 12 months.  For this you go to the customization of the graph and replace the dimension “Solution Area” by the dimension “Solution Capability”. 

 As result you would get the names of the relevant Solution Capabilities. Now if you select the bar in the graph the table will display the details only for the selected Solution Capability.

Additionally to an overview of the functional usage across all products you can focus on a single product by using the filter for the Logical Product. All graphs and the table will be updated according to your selection. This is the way how you easily can check the functional usage of each logical product.

In the table you see all Solution Capabilities listed with additional details and link to the documentation and to the relevant logical product. Here you can see additional details to the Product like orders, number of systems etc.

When subscribed a material bundle that allows you to use some functionalities (Solution Capabilities) assigned to a particular Logical Product, though you did not subscribe explicitly for this Product itself. This explains why in this case you might see logical products listed in the table with Solution Capabilities which you did not purchased. You would see it when you navigate to the product using the link in the table.

Please use the ‘Feedback’ slider on the right edge of the page of the application to share with us your feedback on this new tool and help us to improve the reporting functionality in SAP for Me.

Stay updated by subscribing to this blog and visiting the SAP Support Portal / Customer Insights.

SAP for Me is made for you!

Related blogs: SAP for Me goes reporting  or all related blogs to ‘Customer Insights’ reporting dashboard.
